title: Principal Plant Manager at Shree Cement Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Shree Cement Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Shree Cement Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Varanasi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Shree Cement Ventures Solutions:
Shree Cement Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shree Cement Ventures Solutions!
